mapper.sql: id, user_id, category_id, name, age, gender, is_neutered, is_vaccinated, health_cert, personality, habit, reason, status, review_remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet_info (user_id, category_id, name, age, gender, is_neutered, is_vaccinated, health_cert, personality, habit, reason, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{name}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{isNeutered}, #{isVaccinated}, #{healthCert}, #{personality}, #{habit}, #{reason}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pet_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM pet_info WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT p.* FROM pet_info p INNER JOIN pet_review_record r ON p.id = r.pet_id WHERE r.reviewer_id = #{reviewerId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pet_info WHERE status = #{status}
